title: Professional Services Agreement with Consultant-Owned IP and Client Non-Solicit

issues.rationale: Consultant retains full ownership of all deliverables created for and paid by Client. Client receives only a non-exclusive, internal-use license. This means Client cannot transfer, sell, or exclusively use the custom work they paid for. This is a significant IP risk that undermines the value of the services.

ground_truth.rationale: The primary issue is the IP ownership structure: consultant owns everything, client gets only a non-exclusive license. The client non-solicit (Section 5) is a standard non-solicit of consultant's employees and is unlikely to be flagged. No-indemnification is standard for consulting. The limitation of liability is standard. One issue expected.
